name: BREAKING NEWS (via MurphyforFlorida.com)
subject: "The odds in this race are now 50-50"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2c38/738133e4/36347ad1/7f82be1e/3689581195/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160705?refcode=pme160705_m&recurring=true&amount=25")
---
| **_Cook Political Report:_ The odds in this [Florida Senate] race are now 50-50** We just got some BIG news today, everyone: the odds in our race are now reported as DEAD EVEN. 50-50. Flip of a coin. _Couldn 't be closer!_

_Cook_ also reports that Florida's seat was formerly "the most likely to flip" \-- but "Rubio gives the GOP a big lift."** We don't have a moment to lose -- we've set up a Rapid Response fund to respond to the tightening race, and we have just 48 hours to raise $10,000.**

[**Will you chip in whatever you can right away?**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2c38/738133e4/36347ad1/7f82be1e/3689581195/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160705?refcode=pme160705_m&recurring=true&amount=25")

Rubio flip-flopped and announced he's running for Senate again less than two weeks ago, but he's _already_ got a Super PAC to prop him up. And he raised almost HALF A MILLION DOLLARS at a single right-wing fundraiser with Mitch McConnell last week in Washington, D.C.

Their smear campaign and attack ads against Patrick are only going to get worse. We CAN'T let them drown us out, or our chance at turning Florida blue will be lost.

[**Contribute now to our Rapid Response fund to fight back against Marco Rubio and retake the Senate from Mitch McConnell.**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2c38/738133e4/36347ad1/7f82be1e/3689581195/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160705?refcode=pme160705_m&recurring=true&amount=25")

Team Murphy

|
Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2c38/738133e4/36347ad1/7f82be1f/3689581195/VEsC/ "http://murphyforflorida.com") This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[Click here](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2c38/738133e4/36347ad1/7f82be18/3689581195/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/subscriptions/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") to unsubscribe

Contributions or gifts to Friends of Patrick Murphy are not tax deductible.

---

name: Tim Henderson, GreggForGovernor.com
subject: Trump and Pence?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gregg for Indiana
body:
We don't yet know if he'll get the nod from Trump, but one thing is clearer than ever: We have to fire Governor Pence.
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/5980903007154735104/9118522108899887104?utm_campaign=fnd_trump_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_160706_fnd_gq_trump_ndn__th&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=)
---
Peter, Last weekend, Governor Pence met with Donald Trump amid speculation that he could leave Hoosiers behind to become Trump's running mate. Once again, Pence is putting his own ideology and ambition ahead of his commitment to Hoosier families -- all for a shot at joining a sideshow act like Donald Trump's campaign. We don't yet know if he'll get the nod from Trump, but one thing is clearer than ever: We have to fire Governor Pence. **[Chip in $5 to help us build a campaign strong enough to defeat Governor Pence.](https://act.myngp.com/el/5980903007154735104/9118522108899887104?utm_campaign=fnd_trump_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_160706_fnd_gq_trump_ndn__th&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=)** Hoosier families are struggling to make ends meet. Jobs are being shipped out of the country, incomes are lagging behind the rest of the country, and our kids aren't getting the education they deserve. But instead of hunkering down and trying to fix the problems we face, Governor Pence is too busy interviewing for his next job. Hoosiers deserve better than a part-time governor -- and we certainly don't need Donald Trump's next apprentice in the governor's mansion. **[It's time for Hoosiers to demand better. Chip in $5 to fire our part-time governor and help John Gregg build a better Indiana.](https://act.myngp.com/el/5980903007154735104/9118522108899887104?utm_campaign=fnd_trump_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_160706_fnd_gq_trump_ndn__th&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=)** Thanks for your support, Tim Henderson
Campaign Manager
Gregg for Governor
| | [**Chip in $5 ->**](https://act.myngp.com/el/5980903007154735104/9118522108899887104?utm_campaign=fnd_trump_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_160706_fnd_gq_trump_ndn__th&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=)
---

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/5980903007154735104/-9184106776733808640) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/5980903007154735104/-9112049182695880704)
Paid for by Gregg for Indiana
---
Gregg for Indiana
PO Box 44224
Indianapolis IN 46244 United States

name: Tom Russell, RussFeingold.com
subject: Major endorsements
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
Russ has picked up some major endorsements ... | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf436f/1c469400/614b06d/356cfb9/1977167467/VEsH/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/160706-endorse?utm_source=ema_2016-07-06_endorse&source=ema_2016-07-06_endorse&utm_campaign=endorse&utm_medium=ema") Friend, You might have noticed: Russ picked up some major endorsements recently (Barack Obama, Elizabeth Warren, and Bernie Sanders, to name a few). These leaders are backing Russ because they believe in Russ's vision for a more united Wisconsin and an economy that works for all of us -- not just big corporations and special interests. **[Will you join Barack Obama, Elizabeth Warren, and Bernie Sanders and endorse Russ? Add your name.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf436f/1c469400/614b06d/356cfb9/1977167467/VEsE/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/160706-endorse?utm_source=ema_2016-07-06_endorse&source=ema_2016-07-06_endorse&utm_campaign=endorse&utm_medium=ema")** [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf436f/1c469400/614b06d/356cfb9/1977167467/VEsF/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/160706-endorse?utm_source=ema_2016-07-06_endorse&source=ema_2016-07-06_endorse&utm_campaign=endorse&utm_medium=ema") We're proud of this support. But Russ's campaign isn't about the big, headline-grabbing endorsements, as nice as they are. Team Russ always has been -- and always will be -- about the people of Wisconsin. Russ knows that true leaders actually listen to the people. That's why he's been on the road, visiting each of Wisconsin's 72 counties more than once: because he wants to hear from the hardworking families of Wisconsin. He's been knocking on doors, talking to folks, and fighting for a more prosperous future for every Wisconsinite. **[The most important endorsement that Russ can earn is yours, friend. If you're with Russ, add your name -- along with Barack Obama, Elizabeth Warren, and Bernie Sanders -- and endorse Russ today.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf436f/1c469400/614b06d/356cfb9/1977167467/VEsC/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/160706-endorse?utm_source=ema_2016-07-06_endorse&source=ema_2016-07-06_endorse&utm_campaign=endorse&utm_medium=ema")** Thanks, Tom Russell
Campaign Manager | [ADD YOUR NAME »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf436f/1c469400/614b06d/356cfb9/1977167467/VEsD/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/160706-endorse?utm_source=ema_2016-07-06_endorse&source=ema_2016-07-06_endorse&utm_campaign=endorse&utm_medium=ema")
---

\------
_If you're with Russ, consider making a**[contribution](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf436f/1c469400/614b06d/356cfb6/1977167467/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-def?utm_source=ema_2016-07-06_endorse&refcode=ema_2016-07-02_endorse&utm_campaign=endorse&utm_medium=ema")** to the campaign._

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you would like to make a contribution to Russ for Wisconsin, [click here.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf436f/1c469400/614b06d/356cfb7/1977167467/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-def?utm_source=ema_2016-01-11_advocacy-footer-contribute&refcode=ema_2016-01-11_advocacy-footer-contribute&utm_campaign=advocacy-footer-contribute&utm_medium=ema") If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf436f/1c469400/614b06d/356cfb4/1977167467/VEsO/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/advocacy-optout"). If you would like to change your email or salutation, [click here](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf436f/1c469400/614b06d/356cfb5/1977167467/VEsP/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/changeinfo"). [Click here to unsubscribe](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf436f/1c469400/614b06d/356cfb2/1977167467/VEsHBQ/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/unsubscribe"). Contributions or gifts to Russ for Wisconsin are not tax deductible. | Authorized and paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer

name: Grassroots for Steve
subject: Koch bros. arrive in MT mailboxes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P
body:
---
Friend,

400,000 -- that's the number of mailers the Koch-aligned Americans for Prosperity has pledged to blast across Montana attacking Steve BEFORE August 15.

| [](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=tnVxEDLy%2FajpCDke%2FFiO%2Fjx4idoppZRP)
---

That's a whole lot of mail in the next few weeks. So we need our grassroots supporters to come through in a big way. **[Can Steve depend on you for a donation of $15?](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=O%2FBo%2Bc0ofxSjVrpzsajZAzx4idoppZRP)**

Montanans are going to be blanketed with nasty Koch-backed flyers in the coming weeks -- all without AFP having to disclose their donors or how much they are going to be spending. We have to get ready.

These attacks are horribly misleading -- it's pure gutter politics. The fact is, Steve is doing an excellent job running our state. They're counting on being able to spend enough dark money that it doesn't matter. We're counting on you. **[Please pitch in $15.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=Aw%2BgMaolZ8PPRTF4Oeicdjx4idoppZRP)**

Thanks so much,

Grassroots for Steve
| [**DONATE**](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=XRDB09%2FG5Lmopwtl%2FziHIjx4idoppZRP)
---
| Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P.O. Box 1330, Helena, MT 59624
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=bJNAVyPRxB3RXjBOkNayfjx4idoppZRP).

Friends of Steve Bullock
Post Office Box 1330
Helena MT 59624 United States
---
[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

name: Team Katie
subject: Quick Question
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/6711564240328589312/959009434909016064?refcode=e20160706&refcode2=e20160706nd&amount=25)
---
Hey there, one quick question for you --

With our campaign just ONE point behind Pat Toomey in polls, special interests are spending millions to flood the airwaves to **help him misrepresent his unpopular past.**

But we think Toomey's devastating record speaks for itself -- and now, we want to hear from you:

**Which Pat Toomey disaster makes you the most mad?**

**[A. Failed to attend 80% of his Budget Committee hearings](https://act.myngp.com/el/6711564240328589312/959009434909016064?refcode=e20160706&refcode2=e20160706nda&amount=25)**
**[B. Voted FOUR times against raising the minimum wage](https://act.myngp.com/el/6711564240328589312/959009434909016064?refcode=e20160706&refcode2=e20160706ndb&amount=25)**
**[C. Refuses to do his job to support a Supreme Court nomination vote](https://act.myngp.com/el/6711564240328589312/959009434909016064?refcode=e20160706&refcode2=e20160706ndc&amount=25)**
**[D. Consistently put Wall Street's interests before working families](https://act.myngp.com/el/6711564240328589312/959009434909016064?refcode=e20160706&refcode2=e20160706ndd&amount=25)**

Thanks,

Team Katie

| *** A note on donations ***

Katie is fighting for working families in PA -- but we're up against major special interest spending. We're relying on grassroots donations from people like you to win this race and take back the Senate.
**Chip in $5 or more today. Thank you.**

**[Donate Now](https://act.myngp.com/el/6711564240328589312/959009434909016064?refcode=e20160706&refcode2=e20160706nd&amount=25 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/elect-katie-mcginty?refcode=e20160612&refcode2=e20160612nd&amount=25")**
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/6711564240328589312/886951840871088128).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: Bob Fertik, Democrats.com
subject: Help us retake Congress
body:
| | |
---|---|---
| Dear Activist, The DCCC, Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee, is the official campaign arm of the Democrats in the House of Representatives.

We are the only political committee in the country whose principal mission is to support Democratic House candidates every step of the way to victory.

But we can't do it without your help.

Your grassroots participation is critical for building our campaign to defeat Paul Ryan and Republicans across the country.

**[If you do not want to receive future email newsletters from the DCCC, please click here to unsubscribe](http://archive.democrats.com/unsub.cfm?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&fieldname=L46).**

Thanks for your support of Democrats!

DCCC HQ
---
* * *
Democrats.com is the oldest online community of progressive activists, with over 3 million supporters. We fight for jobs, justice, healthcare, education, the environment, and peace. We're supported by great progressive partners so we never ask for donations. Please join us at **[Democrats.com](http://democrats.com)**! You are subscriber #10036727 to Democrats.com Activist Alerts.
[Click here](http://archive.democrats.com/unsub.cfm?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&fieldname=L46) if you do not want future newsletters from DCCC.
If you do not want to receive messages from any of our partners, [click here](http://archive.democrats.com/unsub.cfm?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&fieldname=noads).

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: had to say
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
|
>
>
> Friend,
>
> I just wanted to say thank you for helping us reach our goal before the July 1 FEC deadline! Grassroots donations are what keeps us going and helps us have the resources to get our message out to Maryland voters.
>
> I hope you all enjoyed a safe and happy July 4th. Thank you to everyone who came out to volunteer and join us in parades around the state. Even the rain could not dampen our spirits as we celebrated America's 240th birthday. [](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d87/70cdc2ba/47fdb849/3970d65/4244742684/VEsH/ "https://www.facebook.com/VanHollenForMD/posts/10153745407696732?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em070616&source=em070616") We are just two weeks away from the Democratic and Republican party conventions. The general election campaign season will be in full force before we know it -- and we have lots of work ahead.
>
> **[That's why I hope you will share our Facebook posts with your friends and contacts and urge them to go to our website to sign up.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d87/70cdc2ba/47fdb849/3970d62/4244742684/VEsE/ "https://www.facebook.com/VanHollenForMD/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Thatrsquos+why+I+hope+you+will+share+our&utm_campaign=em070616&source=em070616")**
>
> Many thanks,
>
> Chris

>
>
---

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d87/70cdc2ba/47fdb849/3970d63/4244742684/VEsF/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em070616&source=em070616") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages. Please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.

name: survey@maggiehassan.com
subject: Quick question (RESPONSE REQUESTED)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd59f/2a380d31/130ca26a/fba30f/3871512282/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd59f/2a380d31/130ca26a/fba30f/3871512282/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
This election is about you and all the other hard-working Granite Staters out there. That's why we're putting a survey into the field to see what you think about this election. Please, friend -- answer this quick survey so we can make sure your opinion is recorded. Here's the first question:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd59f/2a380d31/130ca26a/fba308/3871512282/VEsF/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/maggie-nh-survey_nh-nd?&source=e20160706_nhsurvey_nh-nd")
This campaign is about you, so your input is absolutely critical.
-- Team Maggie

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: I can’t wait to thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
I can't wait to meet you | Friend --

I’m inviting a member of this team to be my special guest at the Democratic National Convention in Philadelphia a few weeks from now, and I would love for you to join me. **[All you have to do is add your name for a chance to win.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjU5MTc1MDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwODYxMTQ0S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

You can bring a guest, of course, and the campaign will cover all your travel and accommodations, so all you’ll have to worry about is making sure your phone is charged for lots of selfies! (You never know who you’ll run into at the convention.)

Most importantly, I can’t wait to meet you in person and thank you for all the work you’ve done as part of this team to bring our campaign to this historic moment. I’ll be so happy to know you’re in the room when I accept our party’s nomination -- you made this happen, and you deserve to see history made in person.

**Add your name now for a chance to win, and hopefully I’ll see you in just a few weeks!** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjU5MTc1MDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwODYxMTQ0S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you,

Hillary

|
**Chip in $1 to stand with Hillary -- and be automatically entered to meet her at the Democratic convention in Philadelphia:**

| [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjU5MTc1MDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwODYxMTQ0S0&mt=1&rt=0)

---

******No purchase, payment, contribution, signing up to receive text messages, or signing up to volunteer is necessary to win, and will not improve chances of winning.**

Void where prohibited. Entries must be received between 12:00 a.m. (all times Eastern) on 7/5/16 and 11:59 p.m. on 7/11/16. Enter by visiting [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=19&ms=MjU5MTc1MDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwODYxMTQ0S0&mt=1&rt=0) to donate to Hillary for America, or enter by visiting [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjU5MTc1MDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwODYxMTQ0S0&mt=1&rt=0) to sign up to volunteer for Hillary for America, or enter by texting CONVENTION to 47246 to sign up to receive periodic text messages from Hillary for America. Msg&data; rates apply. Text HELP for help & STOP to cancel. Visit [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjU5MTc1MDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwODYxMTQ0S0&mt=1&rt=0) to enter for free, without contributing, volunteering, or signing up to receive text messages. One (1) winner will receive an invitation for winner and one (1) guest to attend the Democratic National Convention in Philadelphia where they will meet Hillary Clinton; round-trip airline tickets from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to Philadelphia area; and three (3) nights hotel accommodations (approx. value of Prizes: $2500). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens or residents of the 50 states, DC or Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). All prizes awarded. Promotion subject to Official Rules [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjU5MTc1MDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwODYxMTQ0S0&mt=1&rt=0) and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Hillary for America, 300 Cadman Plaza W, Brooklyn, NY 11201.
| | Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1.5 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=MjU5MTc1MDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwODYxMTQ0S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjU5MTc1MDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwODYxMTQ0S0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjU5MTc1MDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwODYxMTQ0S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjU5MTc1MDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwODYxMTQ0S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjU5MTc1MDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwODYxMTQ0S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjU5MTc1MDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwODYxMTQ0S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjU5MTc1MDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwODYxMTQ0S0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjU5MTc1MDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwODYxMTQ0S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjU5MTc1MDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwODYxMTQ0S0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjU5MTc1MDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwODYxMTQ0S0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: UPDATE (via MurphyforFlorida.com)
subject: 50-50 split (Us vs. Rubio)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2c36/738133e4/36287e88/7f82bf78/1772382339/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160706?refcode=pme160706_m&recurring=true&amount=25")
---
| We were well on our way to flipping Florida's Senate seat.

But then Marco Rubio did a complete 180 and broke his promise about running. Now, we're all tied up.

**The _Cook Political Report_ , which formerly listed Florida as a state "most likely to flip," now has us in a dead heat with Rubio. They pegged our odds at 50-50.**

If we're going to turn Florida blue, we can't waste a single second. **We 've set up a Rapid Response Fund to raise $10,000, and we only have 24 hours to go.**

[_**Can you step up and give $5 or whatever you can?**_](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2c36/738133e4/36287e88/7f82bf78/1772382339/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160706?refcode=pme160706_m&recurring=true&amount=25")

This isn't an open seat anymore. We're running against an incumbent -- and Rubio has the Republican establishment, Super PACs, and special interest groups lining up to defend him.

Rubio and his biggest cheerleader, Mitch McConnell, attended a fundraiser last week and raised __a half million dollars__. **That was just in ONE NIGHT.**

It's only been two weeks since Rubio hopped back into the race, but it's clear his political machine is already primed and ready to hammer us with attack ads and smear campaigns.

[_**Don 't let them drown us out. We have 24 hours and $7,892 left to raise. Contribute $5 to help us regain control of the Senate and make Rubio wish he never changed his mind.**_](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2c36/738133e4/36287e88/7f82bf78/1772382339/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160706?refcode=pme160706_m&recurring=true&amount=25")

Thank you,

Team Murphy |
Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2c36/738133e4/36287e88/7f82bf79/1772382339/VEsC/ "http://murphyforflorida.com") This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[Click here](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2c36/738133e4/36287e88/7f82bf7a/1772382339/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/subscriptions/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") to unsubscribe

Contributions or gifts to Friends of Patrick Murphy are not tax deductible.

name: polling@maggiehassan.com
subject: Losing ground in New Hampshire (poll)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd597/2a380d31/1301ab57/fbbe63/3792787158/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd597/2a380d31/1301ab57/fbbe63/3792787158/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Here's where things stand -- Our race in New Hampshire will likely determine Senate control and the future of the Supreme Court, and the polls are WAY too close for comfort.
**Governor Hassan had a small lead, but a recent poll shows that after misleading ads from her corporate special interest backers went on air, Washington Republican Kelly Ayotte is closing in:**
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd597/2a380d31/1301ab57/fbbe6c/3792787158/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwNzA2X3BvbGxzMV9uaC1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160706_polls1_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
The best way for us to bounce back is by putting $30,000 in our Polling Fund by Friday at midnight. With so much on the line, we HAVE to regain our momentum. [**Please, make your support official and donate $3 or more right now so we can get back on track to take back the Senate and secure the future of the Supreme Court.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd597/2a380d31/1301ab57/fbbe6d/3792787158/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwNzA2X3BvbGxzMV9uaC1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160706_polls1_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: Trump raised seventeen times more cash in June
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
Step up to get Hillary to the White House | Friend --

We just learned that Trump raised more than $50 million in June -- after raising just $3 million in May. An increase of 1600% can't be explained away by the checks he wrote himself. Trump has real, substantial support -- his donors are rallying behind him.

And once he receives the nomination at the Republican convention and the general election swings into action, his support will only grow. Trump taunted us, saying that he’s going to teach our fundraising team a lesson -- and I'll be honest, right now, we're learning something.

**Sometimes it seems like people think Hillary has this election on lockdown. But if the Trump gang continues to fundraise at this rate, that won't be the case. It’s absolutely essential to get Hillary in the White House -- and to get her there, we have to step up. Chip in $1 to help put some distance between this campaign and Donald Trump:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjU5MjEyMDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwODk2OTA2S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you,

Christina

Christina Reynolds
Deputy Communications Director
Hillary for America

|
**Donald Trump is the presumptive Republican nominee. This is the only team that can stop him -- chip in $1 to help take Trump on:**

| [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjU5MjEyMDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwODk2OTA2S0&mt=1&rt=0)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjU5MjEyMDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwODk2OTA2S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjU5MjEyMDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwODk2OTA2S0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjU5MjEyMDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwODk2OTA2S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjU5MjEyMDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwODk2OTA2S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjU5MjEyMDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwODk2OTA2S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjU5MjEyMDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwODk2OTA2S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjU5MjEyMDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwODk2OTA2S0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjU5MjEyMDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwODk2OTA2S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjU5MjEyMDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwODk2OTA2S0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjU5MjEyMDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwODk2OTA2S0&mt=1&rt=0)
clean_body: Step up to get Hillary to the White House | Friend -- We just learned that Trump raised more than $50 million in June -- after raising just $3 million in May. An increase of 1600% can't be explained away by the checks he wrote himself. Trump has real, substantial support -- his donors are rallying behind him. And once he receives the nomination at the Republican convention and the general election swings into action, his support will only grow. Trump taunted us, saying that he’s going to teach our fundraising team a lesson -- and I'll be honest, right now, we're learning something. Sometimes it seems like people think Hillary has this election on lockdown. But if the Trump gang continues to fundraise at this rate, that won't be the case. It’s absolutely essential to get Hillary in the White House -- and to get her there, we have to step up. Chip in $1 to help put some distance between this campaign and Donald Trump: Thank you, Christina Christina Reynolds Deputy Communications Director Hillary for America | Donald Trump is the presumptive Republican nominee. This is the only team that can stop him -- chip in $1 to help take Trump on: | **** | | Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1.5 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House). Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
